meta.name: Giridhar Reddy Tatiparthi
meta.title: Data Engineer
meta.summary: Results-driven Data Engineer with 1+ year of production experience building scalable Databricks and Spark-based data pipelines on Azure and GCP. Expertise in Delta Lake, data modernization, ETL/ELT design, and data-driven decision-making.
meta.hero_desc: Data Engineer · Ex-Walmart Global Tech · Building ETL/ELT pipelines at scale with PySpark, Databricks, Delta Lake, Azure & GCP. Processed 10M+ daily retail transactions in production.

bullets: Designed and developed ADF pipelines from scratch using triggers, data flows, and connectors, integrating with Databricks for processing over 10 million daily records.

Implemented partition-based incremental data ingestion using batch_id and batch_date driven logic with a rolling 7-day timestamp window, which eliminated full dataset scans and reduced pipeline runtime from 4 hours to 90 minutes (a 70% improvement).
Designed a layered Medallion data architecture (Raw → Curated → Enriched → Consumption) to ensure high-quality, analytics-ready datasets with consistent schema enforcement and data quality controls.
Orchestrated hybrid cloud data pipelines (Azure + GCP) using ADF and Automic for batch scheduling, validating data arrival through touch files, while maintaining over 99% SLA adherence.

Optimized Spark performance using partitioning, caching, broadcast joins, and query tuning for large-scale distributed datasets. I monitored production pipelines and resolved failures through root cause analysis. I wrote efficient SQL queries that included joins, aggregations, and window functions for large-scale data transformations and reporting.
Worked closely with upstream SAS teams and downstream BI stakeholders, tracking pipeline failures, schema changes, and data quality issues in Jira while following CI/CD deployment practices with Git.

Monitored end-to-end production pipelines supporting the BigQuery-based consumption layer, triaged and resolved job failures, and maintained consistent 99%+ SLA adherence across high-volume daily batch processing cycles.
Facilitated end-to-end ETL workflows in Hive and BigQuery for reporting and analytics teams, streamlining data delivery pipelines.
Managed incremental and historical datasets using Apache Hudi, ensuring accuracy and preventing dataset duplication across analytics pipelines.
Troubleshot Spark jobs and Kafka stream failures to minimize downtime and maintain reliability for critical analytics workflows.

projects.title: Real-Time Health Analytics Lakehouse Platform
projects.description: A fully end-to-end Databricks Lakehouse built from scratch to process wearable IoT health data at scale — built with Kafka + Spark Structured Streaming, Medallion architecture, and Unity Catalog governance.
bullets: Built a real-time Databricks Lakehouse using Delta Lake and Medallion architecture to process wearable IoT health data (BPM, workout, GYM events) at scale.
Developed Kafka + Spark Structured Streaming pipelines with CDC handling for user profiles and high-volume sensor event streams.
Delivered business-ready Gold datasets for daily workout heart-rate analytics and gym utilization reporting, with governance via Unity Catalog.
End-to-end ownership — from raw ingestion through to analytics-ready consumption layer — replicating production Lakehouse patterns.

projects.title: ETL-Toll-Data-Pipeline-using-Apache-Airflow
projects.description: A complete end-to-end ETL pipeline that ingests raw toll transaction data from multiple file formats (CSV, TSV & Fixed Width), processes and transforms it using Airflow PythonOperators, and loads the final curated dataset into a PostgreSQL fact table.
bullets: Designed and implemented an end-to-end ETL pipeline using Apache Airflow, orchestrating data ingestion, transformation, and loading workflows with scheduled DAGs.
Built automated data pipelines to process toll data from multiple sources, ensuring data consistency, reliability, and fault tolerance.
Applied data transformation techniques using Python to clean, structure, and prepare data for downstream analytics.
Implemented workflow monitoring, logging, and retry mechanisms in Airflow to improve pipeline robustness and observability.

certifications.title: Microsoft Certified: Fabric Data Engineer Associate
Astronomer Certification for Apache Airflow Fundamentals
Databases and SQL for Data Science with Python
